sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15233" key="a(rmathlatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁρμᾰτ-ηλᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype> : <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μονομερής, διμερής, τετραμερὴς ἁ.,</foreign> names of <sense id="n15233.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandages,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:12:513" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fasc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.513</biblScope> </bibl> C.(tit.).</sense> </entryFree>
